title: Spicy Malaysian Noodle Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful Malaysian-inspired noodle dish made with peppery notes and a variety of textures.

ingredients.name: peppery vegetable mix
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms

instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
Heat the peanut oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the peppery vegetable mix and stir-fry until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, chili flakes, and salt. Stir-fry for another minute, until the flavors are combined.
Add the cooked noodles to the wok and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with fresh cilantro.
